ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher joined the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update made to the researcher's profile */,
  "area_of_expertise" TEXT /* Researcher's area of expertise */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Researcher's job title */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Researcher's contact email */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Researcher's contact phone number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Researcher's current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is based */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Organization's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Project status */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the project's findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_projects" (
  "researcher_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-project relationship */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher participating in the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the researcher is involved in */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution made by the researcher */,
  "project_contact_email" TEXT /* Researcher's project-specific contact email */,
  "project_contact_phone" TEXT /* Researcher's project-specific contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Principal Investigator, Co-Researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_roles" (
  "researcher_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-role relationship */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the researcher */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the role is associated with */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the researcher's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher's profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the researcher's profile */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type and version used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
